metadata.label: gen2/Fanduel-AnalyticsManager
metadata.title: Analytics Manager
metadata.team_direction: FanDuel is the premier mobile gaming company in the United States and Canada, seeking a Manager of Analytics to lead a team focused on Fraud & Payments within the Security, Risk & Compliance Analytics

findings.issue: Opening framing is transition-first ('Transitioning from analytics into data and product-focused engineering' / 'Candidate'), so the first screen does not immediately read as a role-first analytics profile.
findings.fix: Rewrite the first sentence to lead with target role + domain + strongest stack, e.g. 'Analytics leader / analytics engineer with 3+ years using SQL, Python, and Spark to build security and operations workflows.'

findings.issue: The first skills line foregrounds general programming rather than the JD's core SQL/analytics signal, so the top of the skills block is not doing enough ATS work.
findings.fix: Move SQL / analytics-relevant skills to the first line or rename the first category so the strongest JD match appears first.

findings.issue: The JD is for a Manager-level role, but the resume only shows individual-contributor delivery. There is no explicit people-management, mentoring, hiring, performance-review, or roadmap-ownership evidence to justify manager scope.
findings.fix: Add one truthful leadership bullet if it exists (mentoring, roadmap ownership, cross-functional decision ownership, hiring support, or performance feedback). If none exists, this is a structural mismatch. [结构性错配]

findings.issue: The resume bridges well to security and operations, but it does not explicitly connect that work to fraud, payments, or compliance analytics, which are the team's stated focus.
findings.fix: Add one bridge sentence or bullet tying prior work to fraud detection, payment integrity, settlement risk, reconciliation, or compliance monitoring if that was part of the actual scope.

findings.issue: The newest experience relies almost entirely on percentage improvements, with no concrete scale/scope anchor such as volume, dataset size, alert rate, SLA, or team footprint.
findings.fix: Add one concrete scope metric to the first TikTok bullet or project bullet so the result is grounded in a measurable operating scale.

revision_priority: [MUST] Add truthful manager/leadership evidence, or accept that this is a structural mismatch for an Analytics Manager role.
[MUST] Rewrite the first Summary sentence to be role-first instead of transition-first.
[MUST] Add one concrete scale/scope metric to the newest TikTok experience or project bullet.
[SHOULD] Add one explicit bridge from prior security/ops work to fraud/payments/compliance analytics.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] 这份简历当前更像 IC analytics / data engineering profile，而不是 Analytics Manager。先把 Summary 第一句改成“角色 + 领域 + 最强技术栈”的首屏表达；然后在最相关经历里补 1 条真实的 people/roadmap/mentoring/decision-ownership 证据，否则不要硬撑 Manager。再给 TikTok 最新经历补 1 个可追问的规模指标（cases/day、alerts/day、dataset size、SLA、team footprint），并补 1 句把 security/investigation 或 settlement work 明确桥接到 fraud & payments analytics。保留 SQL/Python/Spark 证据，不要删技术栈。

revision_priority: [MUST] Add truthful manager/leadership evidence, or accept that this is a structural mismatch for an Analytics Manager role.
[MUST] Rewrite the first Summary sentence to be role-first instead of transition-first.
[MUST] Add one concrete scale/scope metric to the newest TikTok experience or project bullet.
[SHOULD] Add one explicit bridge from prior security/ops work to fraud/payments/compliance analytics.
